message:
fix(codegen): Fix module resolution and Lib export issues

Module resolution fixes:
- Add platform, secrets, configparser, argparse, html, xml, email, signal,
  statistics, gzip modules to runtime.Lib struct for proper DCE-friendly imports
- Add builtins module const binding for local imports in functions
- Fix module-level builtins const generation in Phase 3

Codegen fixes:
- Fix malformed __eq__ return in return_stmt.zig - use captureExpr/emitValue
  pattern instead of genExpr to avoid buffer mismatch bug

Runtime Lib fixes (Zig 0.15 compatibility):
- email/encoders.zig: Change var to const for non-mutated allocations
- email/header.zig: Change var to const for non-mutated allocations
- gzip.zig: Rename local variable to avoid shadowing function declaration
- secrets.zig: Change var to const for non-mutated allocations
- signal.zig: Change var to const for non-mutated mask
- statistics.zig: Remove unused local constant
- xml.zig: Move NodeType enum before struct fields to fix declaration order
- xml/element.zig: Rename iter variable to avoid shadowing method
